text.title: Gce Managed Instance Groups Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the gce-managed-instance-groups methodology end-to-end. Each step lists explicit input → action → output and (optionally) a decision-gate.

step.name: design-mig
step.action: Choose regional MIG, target size, placement.

step.name: create
step.action: Create MIG with auto-healing, rolling-update policy.

step.name: lb-attach
step.action: Attach MIG as LB backend with connection draining.

step.name: rolling-update
step.action: Roll out update with explicit maxSurge / maxUnavailable.
